name: gnome-shell-extension-stt
description: Speech-to-text GNOME Shell extension — record audio and transcribe via OpenRouter

scripts.pack: bun run build.ts && rm -f stt-ego-upload.zip && (cd dist/stt@pvmnsdev.gmail.com && zip -r ../../stt-ego-upload.zip . -x 'schemas/gschemas.compiled')
scripts.i18n:refresh: xgettext --from-code=UTF-8 --keyword=_ --keyword=N_ -o stt-gnome-extension.pot src/prefs.ts src/extension.ts && for po in locale/*/LC_MESSAGES/stt-gnome-extension.po; do msgmerge --update --backup=none "$po" stt-gnome-extension.pot; done
